title: Axios npm packages backdoored in supply chain attack

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Axios npm packages backdoored in supply chain attack
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/31
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '142.11.206.73'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*setup.js*'
            - '*sfrclak.com*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 142.11.206.73 any (msg:"CDB APEX - Axios_npm_packages_backdoored_"; sid:8764045; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 142.11.206.73 any (msg:"CDB APEX Axios_npm_packages_backdoored_"; sid:2706910; rev:1;)
